title: Table sizes
command: SELECT relname, pg_size_pretty(pg_total_relation_size(relid)) AS total_size, pg_size_pretty(pg_relation_size(relid)) AS table_size, pg_size_pretty(pg_indexes_size(relid)) AS index_size FROM pg_stat_user_tables ORDER BY pg_total_relation_size(relid) DESC;
description: List all tables with their total size, data size, and index size.
